title: Do-Catch Block
description: Execute error-prone code safely and handle specific failures using the do-catch syntax.
problemStatement:
Handle the crash! Call the throwing function from the previous task using a `do-catch` block. Print `"Caught error"` if an error occurs.

**Requirement:** Use `try` before the function call.
hints: You MUST use `try`, `try?`, or `try!` when calling a function marked with `throws`.
